title: Iron Ore: Chinese Steel Production Under Pressure
section_path: Iron Ore: Chinese Steel Production Under Pressure
section_path_text: Iron Ore: Chinese Steel Production Under Pressure
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
This week has seen some rather disappointing economic data coming out of China, which has raised fears among analysts of an imminent slowdown of the Chinese economy and fueling concerns about the continued global economic recovery. The continued struggle for the domestic Chinese economy to regain its momentum was further highlighted by weak retail sales growth, with consumers spending less than expected during the summer holiday break. The repeated coronavirus outbreaks and new travel restrictions have dented consumer confidence, resulting in the growth of expenditures at a meagre two and a half per cent and well short of the seven per cent anticipated by the economists.
